items.title: Business case and risk acceptance documented
items.description: Legal, regulatory, and privacy review before production LLM use.
items.how_to_find: Review LLM pipeline in "Governance and Risk". Legal, regulatory, and privacy review before production LLM use. Inspect prompts, RAG corpora, tool schemas, and agent logs. Run red-team prompts (direct/indirect injection) and verify guardrails block exfiltration.
items.how_to_fix: Implement OWASP LLM Top 10 controls: input/output filtering, tool allowlists, human approval for sensitive actions, tenant isolation for RAG, model/version pinning, and audit logs without storing secrets in plain text.
